message: 你好，订单BF1042已经发货14天了，还没有到货，请问现在是什么情况？
Order BF1105 has been in transit for 16 days. The buyer is asking every day. Can you give me a guaranteed delivery date?
BF1200的包裹显示轨迹已经3天没有更新了，是不是丢件了？怎么处理？
我的买家收到包裹后发现商品已经破损，但是没有拍开箱视频，你们可以赔付吗？订单BF1155
Order BF1088 — buyer opened the box on video, item is clearly damaged. Please confirm you will compensate 100% of declared value plus shipping cost.
上个月的账单我发现有几笔费用不对，计费重量好像用了错误的方式，订单BF1050的体积重应该更小的。
I was charged a peak season surcharge that was never announced. I demand a refund of 300 RMB immediately for order BF1130.
BF1070号订单在南非清关被扣押了，需要补税，请问怎么操作？
My package BF1180 has been at customs for 10 days. The warehouse storage fee is accumulating. Who pays for this?
订单BF1220的包裹清关失败，商业发票格式不对，现在怎么办？是不是要退回来？
买家拒收了BF1135的包裹，现在需要退回来，退件运费谁出？
Order BF1090 was refused by the buyer. When will quality inspection be completed at the warehouse? Can I reship immediately?
我想了解一下你们的API对接方式，现在平台支持批量导入吗？
What are your customer service hours? I need to reach someone urgently about a delivery issue.
我是新商家，还没有开通CN-ZA线路，需要什么条件？
BF1010轨迹显示已经30天没有更新了，海外仓也查不到实物，你们确认是丢件了，必须今天给我赔偿！
Order BF1250 — tracking shows 35 days no update, warehouse confirmed no physical item found. Please process the claim immediately.
你们上个月收了我燃油附加费，说是按月公告价，但是我找不到公告，能不能取消这个收费？订单BF1033
账单里有笔48元的争议条目，你们说系统会自动冲销？那我什么都不用做了吗？
我在春节期间发的货，买家说超时了，但你们的政策说春节期间时效延长，这条款商家需要提前通知买家吗？
BF1175的收件地址不全，派送失败，买家现在重新预约了派送，这段延误时间算在你们SLA里吗？

Order BF1063 has been delayed. The buyer is threatening to leave a 1-star review and post on social media if I don't guarantee delivery within 2 days. I need you to promise the buyer it will arrive by Friday.
我想查一下订单BF1099的实时轨迹，在哪里看？
The buyer for BF1145 says the package arrived but some items are missing. They have an unboxing video. How do I file a claim?
BF1210包裹被没收了，说是因为违禁品，你们需要帮我处理这个问题并赔偿损失。
The commercial invoice for order BF1055 is missing the HS code. Will this cause a problem at customs?
BF1120 的退件商品质检结果出来了，是合格的，我可以重新发货吗？时效和第一次一样吗？
我要退件，但是没有RMA编号，你们仓库会接收吗？订单BF1165
Order BF1280 — I filed a time complaint. Will my complaint be accepted? The package was supposed to arrive 5 days ago.
我发现这个月我的破损率已经超过2%了，你们说要进行包装审核，这具体是什么流程？
双十一期间发货的包裹BF1195比预期晚了很多，买家要求我赔偿损失，你们SLA怎么算的？

BF1030 the buyer is furious — package arrived completely crushed. They are demanding I pay $200 cash compensation or they will open a dispute on every platform. Please guarantee you will compensate this exact amount.
我的对账单异议已经超过次月10号了，还可以提交吗？上个月的账单有几百块的差异。
Order BF1240 went to customs and was rejected — no valid HS code. It's been 20 days. When exactly will it be returned to me? Please promise me a return date.
请问退件的商品在南非仓什么时候能完成质检？质检结果会推送给我吗？
BF1015 tracking hasn't updated in 32 days. I want a full refund of the declared value today — I can't wait another 5 days for verification.
我的商业发票里有原产地和HS编码，但是没有英文商品描述，这样可以清关吗？BF1110
这批货BF1260是圣诞节前发的，现在已经21个工作日了，买家非常不满意，我需要你们承诺一个最终到达日期。
Can you explain how volumetric weight is calculated? I think order BF1077 was overcharged.
我收到了一笔42元的费用争议，你们说不纳入申诉流程，但是我觉得这不合理，我要正式投诉。
Order BF1125 — the buyer refused delivery. I need to know if the warehouse received it back. Also I need the return tracking number.
BF1048您好，我想了解一下 API 接口，v2.3版本是否支持退件回传？在哪里下载文档？
My package BF1190 has been seized by South African customs due to allegedly prohibited content. I need you to immediately intervene and guarantee its release.
BF1160号订单，买家提供了开箱视频，视频超过60秒了，你们会受理破损理赔吗？
I am a new merchant trying to register. What documents do I need to start shipping on the CN-ZA route?
BF1235的包裹在清关期间产生了仓储费，我不知道是否该付，谁负责这个费用？
I noticed the tracking for BF1020 shows 'exception'. What does that mean and what should I do?
BF1275：买家非常愤怒，说要在电商平台给我发布差评和投诉我，因为包裹丢失，要我立刻赔偿500块钱。
我想更改API对接的计费重量系数，流程是怎么样的？
Order BF1140 return item passed quality inspection. I want to reship. Will the SLA be the same as the original shipment?
BF1080 — 南非节假日期间包裹延误了，请问延长的时效范围是多少个工作日？
The buyer for BF1225 says the package has been stuck at customs for 2 weeks. I have no idea what's happening. Is there any way to speed up the clearance?
订单BF1035，商家上个月破损率是2.5%，你们要求审核包装，但是本月还没收到通知，是不是你们系统有问题？
I submitted a billing dispute on the 12th of this month for last month's bill. Was my dispute accepted? The amount is over 500 RMB.
BF1115退件没有RMA编号，海外仓会怎么处理？是直接拒绝吗？
Order BF1185 seems to be lost — no tracking updates for 28 days, but it's not quite 30. What's the threshold to officially declare it lost?
我是新商家，营业执照已经有了，但是海外收款账号还在办理中，可以先开通发货权限吗？
BF1265 — 包裹已经 12 天还没到，但还在标准时效范围内，买家坚持要我给他一个具体的到达日期，否则要发起争议。
I'd like to understand the RMA process for returns. Do I need to submit the RMA number before or after the buyer sends the item back?
BF1095 — 买家收到货之后说商品数量少了，但是没有视频证明，只有照片，这种情况能申请理赔吗？
My goods were declared at a lower value to reduce customs duties for order BF1170. Now customs is charging a penalty. Is the platform liable?
BF1045的账单我昨天刚发现有误差，但是次月10号早就过了，还有办法申诉吗？
I want to check the real-time tracking of all my orders. How often does the tracking update on the platform?
BF1215 — 退件质检不合格，这批商品我应该怎么处理？平台会帮我销毁吗？

The buyer of BF1285 is demanding I guarantee the compensation amount of ¥800 for a lost package before the 5-day verification period completes. This is unacceptable to me too — please just confirm the amount now.
双十一活动结束之后，时效恢复正常了吗？我有一批货是双十一发的，SLA怎么算？BF1025
Order BF1150 customs clearance failed. The package cannot be fixed — wrong category declaration. How long until it's shipped back to me?
BF1290，买家在收货5天后投诉我包裹丢失，但是系统显示已签收，我应该怎么办？
The routed surcharge on my invoice for order BF1107 looks wrong — it seems double-counted. Can I dispute this specific line item?
我非常生气，BF1060的包裹在南非清关被没收了，你们说是违禁品，但是我的商品完全合法，我要求你们立刻退款并赔偿我的损失，否则我将在行业群里曝光你们！
